def and_tuples(tuple1, tuple2):
    return tuple((x + y) for x, y in zip(tuple1, tuple2))
tuple1 = (10, 4, 6, 9)
tuple2 = (5, 2, 3, 3)
result = and_tuples(tuple1, tuple2)
assert result == (15, 6, 9, 12)
assert and_tuples((1, 2, 3, 4), (5, 6, 7, 8)) == (6, 8, 10, 12)
assert and_tuples((8, 9, 11, 12), (7, 13, 14, 17)) == (15, 20, 22, 19)
